scripts.build: npm run clean:build && tsc -b && npm run build:ui -w @openhermit/gateway && npm run build:ui -w @openhermit/web
scripts.test: npm run build && export $(cat .env | xargs) && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL_TEST node --import tsx --test apps/agent/test/*.test.ts apps/cli/test/*.test.ts apps/web/test/*.test.ts
scripts.dev:studio: export $(cat .env | xargs) && cd packages/store && npx drizzle-kit studio
